title: Notice: 2016 Master File Cost Recovery Consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Notice: 2016 Master File Cost Recovery Consultation
This consultation document is intended to provide an opportunity to review the proposed new Master Files (MF) service fees and to consider possible impacts for MF Holders, Drug and Clinical Trial Sponsors, and members of the public. This document outlines the requirements for establishing non-regulatory charges and a rationale for the proposed fee levels and annual increases.
This consultation is open for comment starting November 29, 2016 until January 9, 2017 . Please select and read through the link below titled “consultation document”. Once read please submit your comments via email, fax or by mail to:
policy_bureau_enquiries@hc-sc.gc.ca
Health Canada Health Products and Food Branch, Therapeutic Products Directorate Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs Address Locator 3102C3 Holland Cross, Tower B 1600 Scott St. Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
Consultation Document
Interested parties are encouraged to provide comments and suggestions by January 9, 2017 .

## Reporting to Canadians
Health Canada will make the results of this consultation available on this web site.
If you have any questions, contact us at Bureau of Policy, Science and International Programs .
Interested in our other consultations? Sign up and stay informed about topics that matter to you.
